name: Tune fallow for design system
description: Reduce false positives in fallow for this monorepo, adjust config/scripts where justified, fix obvious issues, and validate with pnpm ai.
result: Updated fallow config for the ui package, ignored obvious non-product paths, fixed packages/db to use postgres, refreshed the lockfile, and verified pnpm fallow:dead-code plus pnpm fallow:dupes. pnpm ai still fails on pre-existing type/import issues outside this change set.
